segments.text: The LORD hath said that he would dwell in the thick darkness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But I have built an house of habitation for thee, and a place for thy dwelling for ever.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: And the king turned his face, and blessed the whole congregation of Israel: and all the congregation of Israel stood.
Blessed be the LORD God of Israel, who hath with his hands fulfilled that which he spake with his mouth to my father David, saying,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Since the day that I brought forth my people out of the land of Egypt I chose no city among all the tribes of Israel to build an house in, that my name might be there; neither chose I any man to be a ruler over my people Israel:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And he stood before the altar of the LORD in the presence of all the congregation of Israel, and spread forth his hands:

For Solomon had made a brasen scaffold, of five cubits long, and five cubits broad, and three cubits high, and had set it in the midst of the court: and upon it he stood, and kneeled down upon his knees before all the congregation of Israel, and spread forth his hands toward heaven,

footnotes: long…: Heb. the length thereof, etc

segments.text: O LORD God of Israel, there is no God like thee in the heaven, nor in the earth; which keepest covenant, and shewest mercy unto thy servants, that walk before thee with all their hearts:
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: If a man sin against his neighbour, and an oath be laid upon him to make him swear, and the oath come before thine altar in this house;

footnotes: and an oath…: Heb. and he require an oath of him
heading: Conditions for God's Judgment

segments.text: Now, my God, let, I beseech thee, thine eyes be open, and let thine ears be attent unto the prayer that is made in this place.
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: unto…: Heb. to the prayer of this place

segments.text: Now therefore arise, O LORD God, into thy resting place, thou, and the ark of thy strength: let thy priests, O LORD God, be clothed with salvation, and let thy saints rejoice in goodness.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: O LORD God, turn not away the face of thine anointed: remember the mercies of David thy servant.
segments.speaker: Solomon
